programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: In order to increase profits, Krabs decides that the Krusty Krab will now be open 24 hours a day. He orders SpongeBob and Squidward to work all night - what's known as the Graveyard Shift.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Sponge/ Sing a Song of Patrick
programme.desc: Spongebob becomes popular at the Krusty Krab; Spongebob helps Patrick get radio play.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Texas/ Walking Small
programme.desc: Sandy is homesick for 'good ol' Texas'; Plankton convinces SpongeBob to be mean.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Musclebob Buffpants/ Squidward, the Unfriendly Ghost
programme.desc: Squidward pretends to be a ghost to get Patrick and Spongebob to leave him in peace.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pizza Delivery/ Home Sweet Pineapple
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Squidward deliver Krabby Patty pizza; SpongeBob loses his pineapple house to parasites.

programme.title: The Loud House: Crimes of Fashion/ Scales of Justice
programme.desc: When Leni gets fired from her job due to missing scarves, Lincoln and Clyde take on the case.

programme.title: The Loud House: Jeers for Fears/ Tea Tale Heart
programme.desc: After agreeing to go to The Royal Woods House of Terror, Linc and Clyde have to toughen up and face their fears./Lola discovers Lucy has an old, fragile doll and decides she must borrow it – no matter what Lucy says.

programme.title: The Loud House: Snoop's On/ How Double Dare You
programme.desc: The siblings turn to Lisa's genius to help them land a spot on 'Double Dare.' After secretly reading Luna's diary, Leni and Lincoln become worried about her.

programme.title: The Loud House: Ruthless People/ What Wood Lincoln Do?
programme.desc: When the house is infested with termites, half the family stays with Pop Pop and the others with Aunt Ruth.Lincoln has to complete a woodworking assignment but has a history of failure on the topic.

programme.title: The Loud House: A Star is Scorned/ Senior Moment
programme.desc: When Lola realizes that double the cuteness could help her break into show business, she teams up with Lily. Lori regrets everything she hasn't done in high school, and vows to make up for lost time.

programme.title: The Loud House: Baby Steps/ Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: When Clyde thinks his parents are having another baby he goes to Lincoln for help on how to be a great big brother. When Lori and Leni both buy the same dress, a fight breaks out leading to Defcon five in the Loud house.

programme.title: The Loud House: One of the Boys/ A Tattler's Tale
programme.desc: Lincoln wishes he had ten brothers instead of ten sisters, and Lisa gives him a glimpse into that reality.

programme.title: The Loud House: A Dark and Story Night/ Sand Hassles
programme.desc: When the lights go out in the Loud House, the kids entertain themselves by taking turns telling parts of a story. Lucy and the Morticians' Club try to thwart plans for a school field trip to the beach.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SquarePants Family Vacation
programme.desc: While on a family road trip to the Great Barrier Reef, SpongeBob and Patrick get lost and end up on the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Eek, an Urchin!/ Squid's Defense
programme.desc: Squidward wants SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate after being robbed of his groceries. SpongeBob goes to great lengths to force out a pesky sea urchin from the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairy Idol
programme.desc: Norm the genie is sick and tired of his lamp and wants to get out of the business. When he learns that any magical creature can apply for a fairy godparent posting if someone quits, he schemes to get Cosmo and Wanda to give up their jobs.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Wishology: The Beginning
programme.desc: Centuries ago, fairy ancestors hid a mystical wand on Earth that has the power to defeat The Darkness, but only the Chosen One depicted in the Fairy World prophecy can unlock its mysteries. Timmy gets chosen for the task, as he resembles the prophecy.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairly Odd Baby
programme.desc: When Timmy becomes aware of Cosmo and Wanda's desire to be parents, he wishes them up a baby. However, the Anti-Fairies and Pixies join forces to use the child to take over the world. Jorgen helps Timmy, Cosmo and Wanda save the day.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Channel Chasers
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for a magic remote control that will allow him to travel through television.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Wishology: The Exciting Middle Part
programme.desc: Timmy learns that to truly defeat The Darkness, he needs a second wand, which is located on the far side of the universe. The threat from the robotic Eliminators still remains as they have stolen Yugopotamia's Fake-i-fier technology.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Abra Catastrophe
programme.desc: It's the one year anniversary of Timmy having Cosmo and Wanda as his Godparents.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Great Balls of Water/ Where's Pinky?
programme.desc: When Candace thinks Jeremy is bored with their usual hangouts, she sets out to find something unique to do with him. When Pinky goes missing, Phineas and Ferb create a machine that amplifies Buford's sense to those of a dog's.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Thanks But No Thanks/ Troy Story
programme.desc: Inspired by Candace’s book club selection, the boys decide to reenact the Trojan War from “The Illiad,” but with a Phineas and Ferb twist.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: The Big Battle for Battleworld
Phineas and Ferb: Love at First Byte/ One Good Turn
programme.desc: Mom asks for help and Candace and Stacy compete in Ultimate Obstacle Course.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Cheers for Fears /Just Our Luck
programme.desc: When Candace is stumped about what to get Jeremy for his birthday, she reluctantly decides to ask Phineas and Ferb for their help in creating a ride of Jeremy’s life.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: An Island of Spiders
Phineas and Ferb: Return Policy/ Imperfect Storm
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb assemble a crazy array of batting cage and Doof uses an inator to return things to the store. Mom gets a backyard makeover and calls Candace to come see it, while Doof makes a Have-A-Bad-Day-Inator to rain out a tea party.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's No Picnic/ Steampunx
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: Portal to the Collector's Tower
Phineas and Ferb: Dude, We're Getting the Band Back Together!
programme.desc: The kids put on a concert in the backyard featuring their parents' favourite old band when Dad forgets his anniversary with Mom.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Druselsteinoween/ Face Your Fear
programme.desc: When Doof inherits a castle in Druselstein, Vanessa moves her Halloween party to the new digs; when Vanessa asks him to babysit her pet bat, Doof has to overcome his lifelong fear of bats.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: The Big Battle for Battleworld
Phineas and Ferb: The Klimpaloon Ultimatum
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb must help Love Handel prove the existence of Klimpaloon, or else Love Handel will be barred from the world of fact-based song writing for all time.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Doof 101/ Father's Day
programme.desc: Dr. Doofenshmirtz is sentenced to community service for being evil, and much to his daughter Vanessa's chagrin, he's assigned to teach science at her high school.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: An Island of Spiders
Phineas and Ferb: Operation Crumb Cake/ Mandace
programme.desc: Isabella sends a letter to Phineas admitting her true feelings, but instantly regrets her decision/ Doof invents an '-inator' to disguise himself as the local pizza delivery boy.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Tales From the Resistance
programme.desc: After Doofenshmirtz is defeated, a new threat in the Second Dimension emerges, leaving it up to Phineas, Ferb, Candace and her resistance fighters to defeat this new foe.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: Portal to the Collector's Tower
Phineas and Ferb: The Return of the Rogue Rabbit/ Live and Let Drive
programme.desc: Doofenshmirtz breaks a rogue animal agent out of high security prison and Perry must go to the glamorous Duchy of Montevillebad to stop Doof from winning the Grand Prix.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Lost in Danville/ The Inator Method
programme.desc: Doof leads a Syd Field style seminar for inventors, Candace tries to bust the boys by multi-tasking and the boys create their own solar system.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: The Big Battle for Battleworld
Phineas and Ferb: Act Your Age
programme.desc: The kids are all teenagers for an episode as a result of someone behind the scenes answering a letter from the mailbag. Phineas has a crush on Isa, Candace has given up busting, and Doof is selling inators for cash.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster/ Candace Loses Her Head
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide to beat boredom by building the best roller coaster ever in their backyard, and Candace's birthday present is to get her face carved into the side of Mount Rushmore.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: An Island of Spiders
Phineas and Ferb: The Fast and the Phineas/ Lawn Gnome Beach Party of Terror
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb enter into a race with a 'tricked out' family car. In the meantime, Perry and Platypus try to stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from deflating everything that is inflatable in the world.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Magnificent Few/ S'winter
programme.desc: As cowboys, Phineas and Ferb drive a herd of cattle across the badlands. Dad shows the boys how to make snow cones with a machine.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: Portal to the Collector's Tower
Phineas and Ferb: Are You My Mummy?/ Flop Starz
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide they want their very own mummy after visiting a local Egyptian movie theatre. A reality show singing competition comes to town and the boys decide they want to become one hit wonders.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Raging Bully/ Lights, Candace, Action!
programme.desc: Phineas is challenged to a duel by the local bully and enters the ring for a thumb wrestling competition. Then Candace gets her chance at fame until Phineas and Ferb enter as directors.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: The Big Battle for Battleworld
Phineas and Ferb: Get That Bigfoot Outa My Face!/ Tree to Get Ready
programme.desc: Gang is off to a visit at Phineas and Ferb's grandparents at their lake house.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's About Time!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an unfinished time machine in a museum and decide to fix it.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: An Island of Spiders
Phineas and Ferb: Jerk de Soleil/ Toy to the World
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on their own show when the Cirque De Lune is unexpectedly cancelled. Then, the boys invent the world's most popular toy, but it doesn't do anything.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: One Good Scare Ought to Do It!
programme.desc: When Isabella is inflicted with an extreme case of hiccups, the boys attempt to scare them out of her by creating an ominous haunted house full of shocking surprises and thrilling twists and turns.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: Portal to the Collector's Tower
Phineas and Ferb: A Hard Day's Knight/ I, Brobot
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on a medieval tournament; Candace takes the role of the Black Knight.

programme.desc: Candace becomes a runway supermodel and the boys decide to take on the fashion world creating a clothing line that personifies summer. Then, Isabella has her tonsils removed so the boys make her the world's biggest ice cream sundae.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's a Mud, Mud, Mud, Mud World/ The Ballad of Badbeard
programme.desc: Grandpa tells the story of a mysterious pirate legend surrounding the old lake around their house. Candice is too scared to learn how to drive, but the boys try to help her overcome the fear.

programme.desc: The kids put on a concert in the backyard featuring their parents' favourite old band when Dad forgets his anniversary with Mom.

programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb accidentally discover Perry's secret lair and are thrust into a spy mission of their own.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Greece Lightning/ Leave the Busting to Us!
programme.desc: The boys stage a chariot race through the streets, just like it was done in ancient Greece. Candace secretly films her brothers designing a white-water rafting ride.

programme.desc: The guys build a roller derby rink for their grandma.

programme.desc: Boys go on an archaeological dig and find a real caveman; he falls in love with Candace.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Prank King

programme.title: Black-ish: The Gift of Hunger

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: A magazine program featuring current events as seen from a Christian perspective, as well as testimonies of changed lives.

programme.title: The Middle: Thanksgiving V
programme.desc: Thanksgiving finds the Heck family in turmoil when Axl tries to figure out the perfect time to tell his parents that he dropped three out of his four college classes; Frankie's dad Tag admits to Mike that he lost a lot of money gambling online.

programme.title: The Middle: The Kiss
programme.desc: When Frankie's sister asks her to housesit, Frankie and Mike jump at the opportunity to have a romantic, kid-free weekend in an upscale home. Technology might just trump romance when they find themselves having a hard time with the gadgets in the house.

programme.title: The Middle: The Christmas Tree
programme.desc: When Axl comes home from college for Christmas vacation but would rather spend time with his friends over family, he and Frankie must come up with a time management agreement that will satisfy both of them.

programme.title: The Middle: Sleepless in Orson
programme.desc: Frankie and Mike become concerned about Brick when he starts expressing a host of irrational fears spawned by a constant stream of news alerts showing up on his refurbished iPad.

programme.title: The Middle: War of the Hecks
programme.desc: Sue's determined to out-prank Axl when she finds out that it was Axl's prank a year ago that forced her to wear the chicken head when she was school mascot. Dr. Goodwin attempts to make Frankie his friend.

programme.title: The Middle: The Carpool
programme.desc: With the bus drivers on strike, Principal Barker asks the parents to form carpools to get the kids to and from school. But with time management not being one of Frankie's strong suits, her carpool kids find themselves being tardy.

programme.title: The Middle: Hungry Games
programme.desc: Excited and hungry over receiving a squatter's coupon at an all-you-can-eat buffet, the Hecks head off to church with the intent of hitting the restaurant immediately after the service.

programme.title: The Middle: The Award
programme.desc: Frankie discovers via a local blog that the quarry is presenting Mike with an award during a dinner for his 20 years of dedicated service. But Mike, not thinking it's that big of a deal, doesn't want to attend.

programme.desc: Alex and April help a pregnant teen through a medical crisis, and Callie and Arizona disagree about what's best for Sofia.

programme.desc: Owen and Amelia take their relationship to the next level; Alex gains some clarity on his future with Jo; and Callie and Arizona continue to struggle with the current custody arrangement.

programme.desc: Meredith and Maggie support Amelia on an important day. Jo reveals that she has been keeping secrets from Alex, while Arizona and Callie deal with the impact of their custody arrangement. Meanwhile, Ben leaps into action to help a friend.

programme.title: The Closer: Cherry Bomb
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is found dead and questions lead to the son of an L.A. County Sheriff. As Johnson investigates, she learns that the son may be hiding behind his father's badge and may have done so before.

programme.title: The Closer: Live Wire
programme.desc: When a reporter alerts Brenda to a crime scene, Priority Homicide and the FBI fight for jurisdiction over the case. Meanwhile, interpersonal relationships on the squad force Brenda into a corner.

programme.title: The Closer: Dial 'M' for Provenza
programme.desc: Things spiral out of control when Provenza goes undercover to look into a murder for hire.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Sanctuary City
programme.desc: While the search for the missing boys continues, the squad faces off with an untrustworthy priest, an angry ex-husband, and threats from the F.B.I. Rusty startles Flynn and Sharon with a surprising request.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Sanctuary City
programme.desc: As Major Crimes continues to search for the remaining St. Joseph's three, Sharon finds her personal life threatening her career.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Sanctuary City
programme.desc: While dealing with a difficult personal matter, Commander Sharon Raydor continues to investigate the St. Joseph's three, their relationship with an overly protective priest and the possibility that two of the teens could be killers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Car Accident
programme.desc: A healthy, young mother mysteriously dies after a minor traffic accident triggering an investigation to find out what caused of her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Black Hole
programme.desc: Investigators search for clues after a body is discovered in a watery grave.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder
programme.desc: A Texas woman claims that an intruder attacked her and killed two of her sons, but detectives question her story when they find some inconsistencies at the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball
programme.desc: In 1962, the people of the small town of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15 year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered. It would take 24 years to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: Forensic scientists study video surveillance of a trio of men who have been robbing banks for 7 years. They are eventually caught because of the forensic team's expert skill.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: America's List: Full Throttle: Double Standards
programme.desc: It's the second-to-last night of racing. Ryan and Murder Nova come up with a plan to get Ryan to number one. JJ and Tricia get their callouts in, but car problems threaten. Axman tries to hold onto the number one spot.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: America's List: Full Throttle: Double Standards
programme.desc: As the competition nears completion, Ryan and Murder Nova develop a plan to get Ryan in the top spot. JJ and Tricia get their callouts in while Axman fights to stay at number one.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: America's List: Axed Out
programme.desc: Chief, Kye and Axman battle through one last night. Brian Davis and Jason Cantu get to settle their beef. JJ and Tricia finally line up against each other.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: The Story of Street Outlaws
programme.desc: The Street Outlaws go in depth into how the show began and talk about what happened when producers came to Oklahoma for the very first time. They talk about their favorite moments from the show, and about how Street Outlaws has changed them.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: America's List: Axed Out
programme.desc: Chief, Kye and Axman battle through one last night. Brian Davis and Jason Cantu get to settle their beef. JJ and Tricia finally line up against each other.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: The Harris Legacy
programme.desc: The discovery of mysterious fishing charts on the Cornelia Maria leads co-captains Josh Harris and Casey McManus to Hawaii to learn what Josh's late father, Captain Phil Harris, was attempting to accomplish decades ago.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Proving Grounds
programme.desc: Josh, Casey and Jeff travel to the southern edge of Kona's fishing grounds a spot Phil Harris frequently explored. Despite the rough waters and unpredictable weather, the trio dives into Kona's shark-infested waters to learn what kept Phil coming back.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Ohana
programme.desc: Josh and his crew get an opportunity to supply ahi and mahi to a local restaurant and hope Phil's notes will lead them to a big payday. It's their first chance to turn a profit but if they want to succeed, they must first learn the Hawaiian way.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Cowboys and Pirates
programme.desc: On Hawaii's Big Island, Josh enlists the help of Johnathan Hillstrand to help him dive deeper into the mystery of Phil's charts and gain insight into the time Phil spent in Kona Town.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: All-Nighter
programme.desc: Inspired by Phil's love of history, Josh, Casey and Johnathan Hillstrand brave unknown waters in the dead of night to try their hand at the ancient Hawaiian Ika-Shibi fishing technique.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: The Legacy Continues
programme.desc: With only two days left before they must head back to Dutch Harbor for King Crab season, Josh and Casey have one last goal to achieve in Hawaii: land a big marlin, the one fish that eluded Phil Harris decades ago.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Well Digger
programme.desc: After joining the Bowie BaySox team as a groundskeeper, Mike joins the Watson Water Company and digs through mud, rock, gravel, sand and water as they drill for heating and water in Tennessee.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Dairy Cow Midwife
programme.desc: In Indiana, Mike learns how to milk, clean, and inseminate cows, and he delivers calves.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mannequin Factory

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Maggot Farmer

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Aerial Tram Greaser
programme.desc: Mike travels to Palm Springs to help maintain and repair the tram 8,500 feet above ground.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Buoy Cleaner

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Bianca and Brogan
programme.desc: A mysterious disappearance occurs online.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Sheklia and Talli

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Artis and Jess

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mecca and Tanner

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Thad and Sara

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Brendon and McKenna

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Catherine and Graham

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Marvin and Austin
programme.desc: After months of sexting with a hot model he met on a hookup app, Marvin is eager to meet him in person. Max and sidekick, singer Chantal Claret, agree to help Marvin find his crush, but soon uncover more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jake and Taylor

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Tony and Tiana

programme.title: Storage Wars: Grin and Barry It
programme.desc: Darrell pays a visit to Ivy's backyard to remind him who the king of storage buying really is. Meanwhile, Jarrod and Brandi feel surrounded by a bunch of pigs.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Adventures of Max Profit
programme.desc: Ivy is on the hunt for high-end in Moreno Valley, and Jarrod reveals to Brandi an alter ego known as Max Profit. Darrell is forced to attend the auction alone. Meanwhile, Rene's addiction results in a close encounter with death.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Ghosts Don't Need Money
programme.desc: Casey tries to put a leash on Rene's spending habits, while Darrell and Brandon rely on their intuition to soar above the competition.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Pay the Dan
programme.desc: Ivy is revved up and looking for high-end lockers, Rene and Casey are at odds over what to buy, and things get a little hairy for Jarrod and Brandi.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Robot Cowboy
programme.desc: The pressure is on for Darrell and Brandon to dial up some merchandise for their website. Ivy's exhaustion forces him to switch into robot mode, and Rene dresses for success. Meanwhile, Jarrod and Brandi have a nice new strategy.

programme.title: Storage Wars: It's Bring Your Kids to Work Day
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi bring their kids to the auction during spring break. Meanwhile, Ivy hopes to stock up for his upcoming store auction and Darrel puts his 'Gambler' nickname to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Mom Factor
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi are all about having fun as they try to dunk the competition. Darrell and Brandon hope to be on par with a victory, while Casey tries her hand at bidding. Ivy transforms his store into an auction house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q spread the love as attendants in a bridal dress shop much to the dismay of the brides-to-be, and break a sacred guy-code in the process. Plus, they attempt to sway frightened focus groups with fragrance campaigns that stink.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Takes the Cake
programme.desc: Find out if any of the Jokers are avid skiers, and how the maître d' helped when seating patrons. Also, learn why Joe had a hard time escaping the giant cake.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: So many shoppers in the candy aisle during 'Star Struck'. The celeb that was on set while the guys filmed 'Brain Games'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Murder
programme.desc: Adam shines a headlight on why drivers are rarely prosecuted for car accidents that result in death. He breaks down border patrol's problematic search policies and examines the messed-up history of corpses and medical studies.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Music
programme.desc: It's time to face the music, as Adam reveals the racism behind rock & roll's origins and the egregious fees of Live Nation's monopoly. He then defends musicians who 'sell out' to make a living in today's digital landscape.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Little Bugs
programme.desc: Adam uncovers the benefits of spiders, serves up knowledge on why we should be eating more bugs as a protein source, and illustrates the benefits of little bugs on your gut health.

programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q, and Murr are forced to think on their feet at a podiatrist’s office, ask strangers for help burying unusual items in the park, and keep their eyes on the prize in a grocery store race.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Not Safe for Work
programme.desc: Timing is everything in comedy. The contestants test their comedy on unsuspecting strangers; teach office staff about proper safety techniques and test their luck with online dating profiles.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Just During the Previews

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: In Case What?
programme.desc: Find out which illusion Michael learned as a kid in magic camp, if he has ever burned himself with a trick, and which horror movie inspired one of his creepiest tricks.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Just a Miker
programme.desc: Find out when Michael's favourite time to avoid contact is, which prank was almost too silly for him to go through with and what bug-infested prop wound up in a dining room.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Just Made History
programme.desc: Find out which bizarre animal was the first choice to play the 'alien' in one of Michael's most popular tricks and what ingredient was so gross it was replaced last minute.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Criminals 23

programme.desc: Two base jumpers, a ski jumper, three fiery crashes, and a wheelie gone very bad. Featuring bold and audacious commentary from Todd Bridges, Leif Garrett, Tonya Harding and the rest of the celebrity panel.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Slight at the Opera
programme.desc: Cameron is putting on the school production of 'Phantom of the Opera,' but when their star falls ill, Manny pulls all the stops to land the lead, even if that means going against Luke.

programme.title: Modern Family: Heart Broken
programme.desc: A fun Valentine's Day romp between Phil and Claire's alter egos, Clive Bixby and Juliana, takes an unexpected turn that lands Claire in the hospital and with a diagnosis that she doesn't take lying down.

programme.title: Modern Family: Bad Hair Day
programme.desc: Claire flies solo to her college reunion and runs into a professor she once dated, but when Phil shows up things get really awkward. Back at home, Jay is obsessed with winning his big bowling tournament.

programme.title: Modern Family: Best Men
programme.desc: Cam and Mitch are made last-minute best men for their best gal pal's wedding. Meanwhile, Gloria has trust issues with their new nanny, Claire has a bonding moment with Haley and Phil helps Luke with a girl he likes.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Wow Factor
programme.desc: Claire and Cam are entrenched in the house flip, but they hit an impasse on a big landscaping decision and must bring in a 'neutral' third-party to help them decide.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Future Dunphys
programme.desc: When Phil takes Claire to the hospital for her angiogram, they encounter a family that is basically their future selves, and they're not sure they like what they see. Manny drags Jay on a visit to a prospective private school.

programme.title: Modern Family: Flip Flop
programme.desc: Phil is pretty confident in his ability to sell Claire and Cam's flipped house, but when it proves to be a little harder than he thought, he recruits the whole family into taking some desperate, borderline crazy measures.

programme.title: Modern Family: Career Day
programme.desc: Phil is jazzed to share the wonders of residential real estate with Luke and Manny’s classmates for career day, but unfortunately for Phil, his nemesis, Gil Thorpe, shows up and things get ugly.

programme.title: Modern Family: My Hero
programme.desc: Mitch’s ex-boyfriend, Teddy, a very personable and successful doctor, invites the whole family to a fundraising event at the local roller rink and they all run circles around each other.

programme.title: Modern Family: Games People Play
programme.desc: Phil gets a brand new RV with high hopes of going on a fun family road trip. Claire decides to let him learn the hard way why this will likely be a terrible idea.

programme.title: Modern Family: Goodnight Gracie
programme.desc: Everyone flies down to Florida to be with Phil after his mom’s passing. Claire helps Phil with Gracie’s last wish for Frank, and the kids reflect on the gifts grandma left for them.

programme.title: Modern Family: Suddenly, Last Summer
programme.desc: Phil and Claire try to orchestrate a kid-free week during Luke, Haley and Alex's summer activities; Cam and Mitch try to have a memorable summer.

programme.title: Modern Family: First Days
programme.desc: Luke and Manny have their first day of high school; Claire returns to the workforce.

programme.title: Modern Family: Larry's Wife
programme.desc: Phil seems to have found his wheelhouse in real estate with recently divorced women, but it's taking up a lot of his time. Meanwhile, Luke invites his buddies over for a high-stakes poker game in the basement.

programme.title: Reunion Road Trip: Back in Scrubs
programme.desc: The stars from 'Scrubs' reunite as they go on a quest to find the show’s beloved taxidermied dog, Rowdy. Along the way, they reminisce about the ground-breaking show, share behind-the-scenes stories, and are surprised by their favorite co-stars.

programme.title: Sex and the City: All or Nothing
programme.desc: Carrie's fling weighs on her conscience; Charlotte plays hardball over a pre-nup.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Running With Scissors
programme.desc: Carrie seeks advice about Big; Samantha's new guy wants her to be tested for AIDS.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Don't Ask, Don't Tell
programme.desc: On the eve of her wedding, Charlotte admits that she and Trey have not slept together.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Escape From New York
programme.desc: While visiting L.A., Samantha meets a model and Carrie meets Matthew McConaughey.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Sex and Another City
programme.desc: While in Los Angeles, the girls head to the Playboy Mansion for a pool party.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Hot Child in the City
programme.desc: Charlotte tackles Trey's problem, while Samantha throws a party for a mature 13-year-old.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Frenemies
programme.desc: Miranda is shocked to learn that her date has died; Carrie teaches a seminar.

programme.title: Tia and Tamera: Adventures in Baby Showers
programme.desc: Tia plans Tamera's Napa baby shower, but Tamera has a tough time letting her sister take the reigns.

programme.title: Tia and Tamera: Tussle and Flow
programme.desc: A very pregnant Tamera keeps herself busy building her baby nursery, while Tia stretches herself thin when she makes a yoga video.

programme.title: Tia and Tamera: Twinventors
programme.desc: The twins make major headway with their lactation drink while Tamera worries about postpartum depression and debates whether or not to post pregnancy pictures online.

programme.title: Tia and Tamera: Stripteased
programme.desc: In an effort to keep the fire alive, Tia takes a strip dancing class for Cory.

programme.title: Tia and Tamera: Overdue and Over It!
programme.desc: Tamera has to confront the fact that her sister is feeling left out of her pregnancy.

programme.title: Tia and Tamera: Twindividuals
programme.desc: Tia and Tamera watch moments together and comment on how they really felt at the time.

programme.title: We Got Love Teyana and Iman: Meet the Shumperts
programme.desc: Power couple, Teyana Taylor and Iman Shumpert, face big transitions in their lives. With Teyana’s recent retirement from music and Iman’s NBA career on hold, they turn their attention to their daughter, Junie, who has ambitions of her own.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Wells Adams breaks down the drama on 'The Bachelorette'. Julie Chen gives all the inside scoop on the upcoming season of 'Big Brother'.

programme.title: Botched: Double Bubble and No Butt Trouble
programme.desc: A pop star impersonator visits the doctors after silicone injections left her with a dented chin. Then, a young woman finally reveals her bad boob job to her mom after years of suffering.

programme.title: Botched: Gimme Gimme More... Surgery
programme.desc: Rajee and her nodules return to see the doctors, a young woman with mismatched breasts need a tweak and a pop star impersonator needs his nose fixed before his world tour.

programme.title: Botched: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: After a dog ripped off half her lip, a 25-year-old seeks help from the doctors while a woman who pumps up her own 4600cc breasts at home gets some much needed advice. Meanwhile, Dr. Dubrow tackles a butt that's affected by spina bifida.

programme.title: Botched: Perfect Chest Quest
programme.desc: Martina Big's extreme summer tan injections have led her back to see the doctors again to continue her transformation. A transgender man is hoping Dr. Dubrow can fix his dented chest and Dr. Nassif is a woman's final hope in curing her panic attacks.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Animal House
programme.desc: Todd gets more than he bargained for when he offers to watch a house full of children. And Julie struggles to let her hair down on a girls' weekend.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Tantrums and Tiaras
programme.desc: Grayson's dream to visit Universal Orlando's Volcano Bay is in jeopardy when his parents work gets in the way.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Last Judge Standing Tournament: Part 2
programme.desc: Judges combine numbers and letters while making a pasta dish with only eight ingredients beginning with the letter 's'. The bottom three chefs enter a wild card round where one must make a comfort food dish in an international cuisine style.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Last Judge Standing Tournament: Part 3
programme.desc: The six remaining judges are put into teams of two to make a regional seafood dish on a budget with a twist. The bottom two teams must each cook for themselves in the redemption round then elevate a guilty pleasure to make it to the semi-finals.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Last Judge Standing Tournament: Part 4
programme.desc: The remaining judges must create their best cheese dish while playing three of the hardest games. The winner heads to the finale and the remaining judges make a refined meal with ingredient from impromptu alley.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Last Judge Standing Tournament Finale: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The final four make a chicken dinner of the panelist's least favourite foods, then play a food pyramid game to determine ingredient weights and what must be their dish. The final two make a meal of seven unusual ingredients to win $40,000 for charity.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon vs. Jackson: Game Day BBQ
programme.desc: The teams celebrate a classic BBQ tradition: tailgating. Team captains Bobby Flay, Michael Symon and Eddie Jackson mentor their pitmasters as they explore BBQ that brings folks together to fire up their team spirit and their taste buds.

programme.title: The Grill of Victory: Grilling Italy
programme.desc: Three elite home grillers do Italian night right with their best meatballs, pizza and herb- and spice-inspired dish, all on the grill. Host Sabin Lomac and judges Susie Bulloch and Darnell Ferguson decide who wins the ultimate outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Chopped: Grills On! Game On!
programme.desc: When the ovens and fryers are turned off, four chefs have no choice but to get their grill on! A rare meat hits the heat in round one, and a frozen food favorite in the second basket might not thrill the competitors.

programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman ask the seven young bakers to make a giant doughnut cake. Using Bundt cake pans, the bakers make a cake in an assigned flavour like strawberry or maple and then decorate it to look like an oversized doughnut.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Insta-licious

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Double as Nice for Half the Price
programme.desc: Kardea Bown cooks up her cousin's favorite restaurant meal, all for under $30! On the menu is a starter of sea island beer steamed mussels and a main course of penne with sausage and greens. For dessert, there's homemade molten chocolate cakes.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: My Sweets!
programme.desc: Kardea Brown invites friends over for a dessert party! The star of the dessert table is a dressed-up carrot cake with apples, raisins, pineapple and a caramel drizzle.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Ladies Who Lunch

programme.title: Chopped: Let's Do Lunch

programme.title: Chopped: Salt Pearls of Wisdom

programme.title: Chopped: Mac and Cheese

programme.title: Chopped: Bacon Boys

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Crystal Skulls
programme.desc: Luminous relics in the shape of human skulls. Otherworldly artifacts believed to harness the secrets of the universe. The Crystal Skulls are some of the most controversial of ancient artifacts.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Visitors
programme.desc: The Dogone people possess knowledge of a galaxy they claim was given to them by a star god named Amma. The Hopi and Zuni people celebrate Kachinas, gods from the sky, whose headdresses and costumes appear to resemble modern helmets.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Mission
programme.desc: Ancient Sumerian tablets describe an alien race, known as the Anunnaki, who came to Earth to mine for gold. Egyptian hieroglyphs depict hybrid creatures that were part man, part animal.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Return
programme.desc: There is evidence that suggests we have experienced 20th century alien contact. In 1942 the US Military allegedly did battle with an alien spacecraft and WWII Allied Air Force planes were once buzzed by strange balls of light.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Earth Station Egypt
programme.desc: Ancient Astronaut theorist Giorgio A. Tsoukalos explores the latest scientific discoveries at some of the world's most ancient places to find evidence that extraterrestrials visited Egypt in the distant past.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Forbidden Bible
programme.desc: It is possible that the Book of Enoch was stricken from the Bible because it documents humanity's extraterrestrial origin.

programme.title: Movie: Blow Out

programme.desc: When a woman sells her earrings to pay a gambling debt, it leads to a string of betrayals.

programme.title: Movie: Elevator to the Gallows

programme.title: Jessie: Kids Don't Wanna Be Shunned

programme.desc: Luke decides that it's time to give up Kenny, his stuffed koala. He tries to spend one night without Kenny and gives him to Jessie to take care of. When Kenny is accidentally damaged overnight, Stuart performs emergency 'surgery' to put him together.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Sorry to Father You
programme.desc: When Raven and Chelsea go on a weekend getaway to celebrate the anniversary of their friendship, the kids are left at home in the care of both Devon and Garrett.

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Foreign Identity
programme.desc: When Nia develops a crush on the new French exchange student, Timothée, she pretends to be a sophisticated Brit to win him over and enlists Booker to help her keep up the ruse.

programme.title: Big City Greens: The Van/ Bat Girl
programme.desc: Gramma and Cricket are upset that an ugly van has been parked in front of their house for what seems like forever. Then, Nancy joins Cricket and Tilly's community center little league team.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cousin Jilly/ Gloria's Cafe
programme.desc: Tilly revives 'Cousin Jilly,' an alter-ego she created to entertain Cricket when they were younger. Gloria opens a secret café in the former Big Coffee space without permission.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Space Chicken/ Steak Night
programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Swimming Fool/ Tilly's Goat
programme.desc: When the Greens visit an indoor pool, Cricket is challenged to jump off the high-dive. Tilly claims that their goat has the spirit of a dog and enters it in a dog show.

programme.title: Jessie: Krumping and Crushing
programme.desc: Jessie enrols Luke in a dance class and to Jessie's dismay, he decides to replace doing homework with dance practice.

programme.title: Jessie: Caught Purple Handed
programme.desc: Jessie finds an agent who wants to be her hand model.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket Versus/ Blue Tater
programme.desc: Cricket must wrestle a wild animal in order to prove himself worthy of the Green family name. When Cricket persuades Bill to convert his pickup into a French fry food truck, he discovers a mysterious blue potato that Gramma says is cursed with bad luck.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Gabby's Big Break
programme.desc: Gabby has trouble stepping away when Swift makes her take a break from babysitting.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Boy Story
programme.desc: Sydney is having trouble balancing time with schoolwork, her friends, and spending time with Harry.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Close Shave

programme.title: Raven's Home: Hoop Streams
programme.desc: When the school's basketball team makes it to the National Championship, Tess rallies everyone to help her host a live telethon to raise funds for the team to travel.

programme.title: Jessie: Cattle Calls and Scary Walls
programme.desc: Jessie auditions for a role in a television series and is convinced that she can talk her way into getting the part. However, it's Zuri who impresses the director. Emma, who Jessie left in charge at home, joins Ravi and Luke to look for rats in the walls.

programme.title: Jessie: Green-Eyed Monsters
programme.desc: Jessie joins a comedy improv class, and Tony goes to embarrassing lengths to prove his love for Jessie. Meanwhile, Ravi recruits Zuri to help him babysit Mrs. Kipling's baby lizards.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Repeat-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv must finish a 6th-grade project to avoid taking summer school. Joey gets Maddie to teach him how to be a jock to impress a girl.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Rate-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv, Maddie and their friends confront a fellow schoolmate who has been giving them numeric ratings based on looks.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Beach Clubs and BFFs

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Austin and Alias

programme.title: Sofia the First: Minimus Is Missing

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly travel to France to get Bob some French toast. Then, the pugs chase Bob's prized baseball across the city.

programme.desc: Bluey and her friends want to play a game of 'Shops'; Bluey and her family take a trip to the pool; The family plays with hand puppets.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want a lick of each other's ice cream. Bingo is playing Bad Mood with Dad. Two babysitters turn up to look after Bluey and Bingo!

programme.desc: When Gloria's parents visit, she ropes the Greens into escalating lies about her success. Then, Cricket goes on a quest to find the best pool in Big City.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Dial 911 for Murder
programme.desc: 21 year-old hopeful romantic, Landy Martinez, is caught in a tumultuous and deadly love triangle. At the scene of the crime is a cell phone with the victim on video pleading for his life. Can the police unlock the evidence to convict the killer?

programme.title: Cold Justice: Digging for Answers
programme.desc: Kelly and Steve head to Oregon to help solve the 1993 murder of a young man allegedly shot and buried by a group of dangerous criminals. They'll need to pit them against each other to crack the case and finally bring justice to his family.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Backwater Bloodshed
programme.desc: Kelly and Steve head into Louisiana to work with the Concordia Parish Sheriff's Office and investigate the 2016 homicide of a 26-year-old whose body was found on the banks of the bayou.

programme.title: Cold Justice: No Safe Return
programme.desc: Kelly and Aaron Sam look into the disappearance of a father who tragically vanished just before he could move back home to his family. A surprising twist comes from a forensic lab.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Small Town Secrets
programme.desc: Kelly and Steve Spingola head to Wisconsin to investigate an unsolved homicide. The case becomes personal after they receive a letter from the victim’s daughters. Their search uncovers a town’s dark side, crimes against children and lies within a church.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Danger at Dawn
programme.desc: Kelly and Abbey Abbondandolo investigate the cold-blooded murder of a fun-loving Texas country boy shot in the back of his head.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Deadly Affairs
programme.desc: Kelly and Steve investigate the 2016 homicide of a hard-working mother who was strangled to death and dumped in a ditch. Was it a random act of violence, or did her strained marriage factor in to her murder?

programme.title: Cold Justice: A Family's Nightmare
programme.desc: Kelly and Abbey search for new clues in the fatal shooting of a mother of six that was initially considered a suicide. Their investigation exposes a heart-breaking trail of secrets hidden for 25 years.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Fatal Betrayal
programme.desc: Kelly and Abbey return to Fort Myers, Florida to investigate the 1997 murder of an aspiring police officer robbed and fatally shot in his motel room. The suspects include four local men and a female witness that may have set him up.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Musclehead Murders
programme.desc: A wealthy Miami couple disappears leaving an abandoned Lamborghini. Police are perplexed until a rich businessman comes forward with a bizarre and torturous tale of a group of muscled men looking for a fast way to flashy cars and a fabulous lifestyle.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Gone
programme.desc: Detective Goren believes that a murder might be a case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Palimpsest
programme.desc: The ghosts of Nichols' past return to haunt him when an old friend is murdered.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: The Mobster Will See You Now
programme.desc: A government official blackmails two doctors who have been overcharging their clients. The doctors worry that the scandal will lead to the retired mobsters who financed their practice.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Kasual With a K
programme.desc: While responding to a call of shots fired, Voight, Antonio and Halstead come across a secret battered women's shelter and discover the owner has been wounded.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: If We Were Normal
programme.desc: When a call comes in about a woman stabbing a man then fleeing the scene, Burgess and Lindsay go investigate and find a young woman with the weapon in her hand.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: In a Duffle Bag
programme.desc: Voight responds to a call about a suspicious duffle bag, and uncovers a frigid newborn baby. Determined to find the culprit who abandoned the infant, Intelligence receives a promising lead based on information provided by Chicago Med.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Justice
programme.desc: After a hooded man opens fire on their patrol car, Roman is left wounded and Burgess takes off after the shooter. No gun is found at the crime scene and the victim is a 17-year-old honour student who will likely never walk again.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: She's Got Us
programme.desc: When Lindsay and Halstead arrive at the scene of a shooting, they discover the only survivor is a young girl. Meanwhile, Antonio and Olinsky look into a pyramid scheme.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Accused
programme.desc: The crime was big news in a small town. Police were swift to key on a suspect. He was a local hero. It was a hunt for justice but was it also the hounding of an innocent man?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Mystery on Bridle Path
programme.desc: In the town of Prescott, Arizona, Carol Kennedy returns from an evening jog and calls her mother for their nightly chat. The call ends abruptly and so begins the mystery on Bridle Path.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Double Lives
programme.desc: A single mother of three vanishes and potential suspects emerge when police discover she may have been living a double life. Where is Paige Birgfeld?

programme.title: Movie: Girls Trip
programme.desc: Four friends who have grown apart take a trip to the Essence Festival in New Orleans where they plan to rekindle their lifelong bonds with each other. Their wild sides come out, and they experience a trip like none that they've ever had before.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Kids Are All Fight
programme.desc: When Homer gets an old film roll developed, the family takes a trip down memory lane to see the origins of how Bart and Lisa first started fighting with each other.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Let's Go Fly a Coot
programme.desc: The Simpsons learn about Grampa's days in the Air Force, and Bart takes up smoking to impress Milhouse's Dutch cousin, Annika.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bull-E
programme.desc: After Bart gets bullied at the school dance, Marge convinces the town to pass anti-bullying legislation. Homer then gets arrested and sent to rehab for bullying Ned Flanders, only to subsequently leave rehab as a hero.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mathlete's Feat
programme.desc: When a modernized Springfield Elementary has a technical meltdown, Lisa transforms it into a Waldorf school. Meanwhile, Groundskeeper Willie becomes the coach of the mathletes.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Every Man's Dream
programme.desc: Homer is diagnosed with narcolepsy, but instead of returning home with his prescription medication, he returns home drunk. He and Marge visit a marriage counsellor and have a trial separation, during which Homer begins dating a twenty-something.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Cue Detective
programme.desc: Scotty Boom, a Chew Network super-chef, challenges Homer to a smoke-off. But when someone steals Homer's secret weapon – a smoker he bought off a mysterious man at a BBQ shack – Lisa and Bart are on the case.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Puffless
programme.desc: Upon learning that their father really died of lung cancer, Selma and Patty agree to quit smoking. When Selma relapses, an angry Patty moves in with Marge and Homer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Halloween of Horror
programme.desc: When Lisa becomes scared at the Krustyland Halloween Horror Night, Homer is forced to take down his Everscream Terrors decorations. Halloween pop-up employees seek vengeance on Homer for causing them to lose their jobs.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa With An 'S"
programme.desc: When Homer loses $5,000 at a poker game with Broadway legend Laney Fontaine, the only way he is able to settle the bet is if he loans Lisa to Laney for a month.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Paths of Glory
programme.desc: Lisa sets out to restore the tarnished reputation of Springfield's first female inventor. To find her invention, she scours an abandoned asylum and a restaurant that caters to men.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Barthood
programme.desc: Bart's coming of age story, a la 'Boyhood,' chronicles his life from six years old to his time as an accomplished young man.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Girl Code
programme.desc: After a photo Marge posts on social media gets Homer fired, he returns to the best job he ever had, a dishwasher at a Greek restaurant. This same post inspires Lisa to code an app that predicts the real-life consequences of anything you post online.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Gets Quarantined
programme.desc: With an upcoming singing competition, the gang quarantines themselves inside Paddy's in efforts to save their singing voices in the midst of a flu outbreak.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Flowers for Charlie
programme.desc: When an experiment successfully multiplies Charlie's intellect and takes him away from the bar, the rest of the gang find themselves struggling to complete the menial 'Charlie Work'.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Squashes Their Beefs
programme.desc: After Frank appears on local television advocating gun ownership, the rest of the gang takes a look at the ownership process and alternatives to find a common ground on this still heated issue.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Beats Boggs
programme.desc: Mac oversees the gang while they compete to break Wade Boggs’ legendary beer drinking record.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Ghost Towns
programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ruins of Disaster Park
programme.desc: A collection of ramshackle structures with a mystical facade lie mysteriously deserted on the tropical island of Bali. Experts investigate and uncover the ruins of a bizarre amusement park complex with a disastrous past.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghost Stories: Ruins of Nazi Nightmares
programme.desc: A Scottish castle with ties to an infamous occupant and a Polish palace concealing a horrific history are now deserted ruins. Experts investigate the secrets behind these Nazi occupied structures to uncover how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghost Stories: Ruins of Nazi Nightmares
programme.desc: A Scottish castle with ties to an infamous occupant and a Polish palace concealing a horrific history are now deserted ruins. Experts investigate the secrets behind these Nazi occupied structures to uncover how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Mystery of the Alien Base
programme.desc: Abandoned hangers and bunkers populate a bizarre facility in the middle of nowhere, but among them are other structures whose purpose are oddly obscured; experts investigate a highly-classified military cover-up with extraterrestrial objectives.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghosts of the Cursed Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a historic Scottish castle is now a bewitching wilderness of hidden dangers with deadly booby traps obscured afoot; experts and historians reveal a bygone Second World War military hospital with bizarre ties to an infamous Nazi occupant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hitler's Nightmare Palace
programme.desc: The ruins of a dreamlike Polish palace hide an astonishingly dark history that's shrouded in mystery to this day. Experts investigate and uncover an ornate gothic structure that concealed a nightmare of Nazi experimentation.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Giant Squid: The Dark Secrets
programme.desc: The ocean's darkest depths are home to mysterious creatures, but none more terrifying than the giant squid. Now experts use new technology to make shocking discoveries that might reveal the secrets of this fearsome monster.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Forbidden Lair of the Yeti
programme.desc: Experts will try to confirm if they've uncovered new evidence of the Yeti using cutting-edge technology on a dangerous expedition to a remote land in the Himalayas to investigate reports of mysterious giant.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Blood for the Snake God
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the bloody origin of the feathered snake god, and experts investigate why the ancient Mesoamericans believed that human sacrifice was the only way to appease the deadly monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Curse of the Vampire
programme.desc: Terrifying new discoveries reveal the bloody truth behind the legends of vampires, and experts investigate why people believed these monsters had a taste for human blood.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Hunting the Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the truth behind the Loch Ness Monster, and experts investigate the world's most mysterious waters in search of evidence that a prehistoric monster could still be lurking in the deep.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Demons of the Devil
programme.desc: The latest science reveals that demons aren't just the stuff of horror stories, and as experts investigate shocking new archaeological evidence, they uncover the gruesome methods used to exorcise humans of demonic possessions.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Wrath of the Minotaur
programme.desc: A new excavation at the mysterious home of the Minoans leads to a startling discovery about real-life origins of the Minotaur, and experts decode artifacts that point to bloody human sacrifices for the ferocious monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: The Kraken Awakens
programme.desc: New discoveries suggest that a sea beast like the Kraken could have existed, and experts examine a strange monster that could give shocking answers into this underwater mystery.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Dark Secrets of the Sphinx
programme.desc: New discoveries uncover the dark secrets of Egypt's strange half-man, half-lion beast, revealing why the pharaohs were so intent on transforming into this powerful and ferocious monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Call of the Werewolf
programme.desc: New evidence reveals why a powerful hallucinogenic drug could be to blame for the werewolf, and people suspected of the power were hunted and killed, but even so, many admitted that they could become these deadly creatures.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Revenge of the Cyclops
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that the cyclops, a one-eyed cannibal, could have been more than just a story.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: Firefighter Sam Dreher and his wife Danielle are the perfect couple. But after their hopes of happiness are dashed, their marriage fails. When Sam falls in love with another woman, his affair triggers a chain of events that spirals out of control.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Webcam of Lies
programme.desc: When a hopeful 12-year-old singer looks for fame online using her webcam, she gathers many admirers, and soon finds a boy who flatters her so much she falls for him. But her dreams become her worst nightmare when a shocking photo is shared online.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Web of Spies
programme.desc: When her fairytale marriage crumbles, a young mother questions just what kind of family she married into. A bitter custody battle leads to a vicious cyberstalking campaign with devastating real life consequences.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Web of Spies
programme.desc: When her fairytale marriage crumbles, a young mother questions just what kind of family she married into. A bitter custody battle leads to a vicious cyberstalking campaign with devastating real life consequences.

programme.title: Onision: In Real Life: Banana Power
programme.desc: Greg Jackson, aka Onision, has become one of YouTube's most controversial figures. After skyrocketing to Internet fame in the mid-2000s, the content creator begins a relationship with an underage fan named Shiloh.

programme.title: Onision: In Real Life: You've Destroyed Me
programme.desc: The Onision saga continues as the world watches his toxic relationship with Shiloh implode. Before the dust can settle, Onision connects with a new teen fan named Kai, and allegations arise that Greg uses Kai to attract a slew of new, vulnerable victims.

programme.title: Onision: In Real Life: Unmonitored, Ungovernable, and Chaotic
programme.desc: Onision's victims begin speaking out, prompting journalist Chris Hansen to enter the arena as law enforcement continues to investigate. Facing a storm of controversy, Onision lashes out against his detractors, trying to save his legacy and freedom.
