programme.desc: When a hopeful 12-year-old singer looks for fame online using her webcam, she gathers many admirers, and soon finds a boy who flatters her so much she falls for him. But her dreams become her worst nightmare when a shocking photo is shared online.

programme.title: Predator at Large: I Will Kill Again
programme.desc: In 1988, 8-year-old April Marie Tinsley is abducted in broad daylight from her Fort Wayne street. Three days later, a jogger makes a heartbreaking discovery in nearby woods which sends cops on a 30 year-long hunt for April's sadistic killer.

programme.title: Predator at Large: Such a Pretty Girl
programme.desc: Thirteen-year-old Carrie Jopek has disappeared. For her terrified friends and family, she seems to have vanished into thin air. But soon after, her body is found underneath a neighbour's porch -- which sets off a hunt for her killer that spans decades.

programme.title: Man With a Van: Handsome Devil
programme.desc: Kenia Monge spends her week days studying and her weekends partying with friends. When she disappears from a downtown Denver nightclub after a night of drinking and dancing, Kenia wanders the streets without purse or phone and encounters a man with a van.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Death Comes Knocking
programme.desc: In a distressing 911 call, a woman reports someone is breaking into her home. Then the dispatcher hears a scream and a gunshot. Soon, investigators connect the case to a previous home invasion and must solve the crimes before another victim falls.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Secrets of the Santa Cruz Mountains
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Linda Jozavich vanishes from work one night in 1979, it just doesn't make sense to her Santa Cruz community. Years later, the murder of another local teen, Lois Sigala, sends investigators a step closer to solving Linda's case.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Savage Country
programme.desc: On their way to Oregon, young lovebirds Kevin Thorpe and Laura Craig come face-to-face with evil on the mountainous, desolate back roads of Northern California.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: She Never Saw It Coming
programme.desc: A young Iranian mom and wife lands the perfect job with a Portland insurance agency. But her charm and intellect make her the focus for several male co-workers. Corporate intrigue turns to cold-blooded murder when she's found dead, shot in the head.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: It's a Christmas day murder scene Portland detectives will never forget, a young woman bound, gagged and mutilated in a horrific manner. And when the killer then turns his sick sights on Homicide Detective Molly Daul, the stakes rise even higher.

programme.title: Dateline: The Trouble in Quitman
programme.desc: When police find a mother and her son shot to death in their home in a small town in Texas, questions arise over whether the husband may have been behind the deaths.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Red Flags
programme.desc: A popular teen is shot down at school, but the shooter was no student, with motives far more sinister than in a typical schoolyard spat. Then, Demery must rely on instinct when investigating a supposed break-in that culminated in a bloody showdown.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: ABC's of Murder
programme.desc: When beloved Charlotte school-teacher Anthony Davis is discovered murdered in his home, detectives searching for his killer discover that despite Davis's best efforts to steer his students onto the right path, evil sometimes triumphs over good.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Letters in the Closet
programme.desc: Karla leaves her home one night and never returns. The next day, her husband calls the police to file a missing person report. When the police uncover a treasure trove of hidden secrets, they have to decide who is telling the truth and who is lying.

programme.title: Disappeared: Spirited Away
programme.desc: Twenty-one year-old Kortne Stouffer vanishes from her bed one night following a couple of scuffles with neighbors and friends. Investigators pursue various leads, but the young beauty is nowhere to be found, and her family clings to an endless hope.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Get Revenge
programme.desc: Scott Eizember has a temper and a history of abuse. So when his girlfriend dumps him, Scott wants revenge. He goes on a violent spree, but is injured during his pursuit.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Through an Air Duct
programme.desc: After killing a man, ex-con Rondell Reed crashes his getaway car and is sent to prison. He and his cellmate escape by squeezing through an air duct. Once free, he steals and carjacks his way north to Ohio where another chase leads to another car crash.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Pretend to Be a Cop
programme.desc: Peter Gibbs is a career criminal who is constantly lured to the dark side after every prison release, despite vowing to go straight. After a string of robberies catches up to him, he faces decades behind bars but refuses to go down without a fight.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Run With My Brother
programme.desc: Mark and Maverick Maher were punks who formed their own militia with a band of youths who robbed houses and broke into cars.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Hammered on a Sailboat
programme.desc: A fugitive murders a man and flees to New York, where he plans a daring escape, while another breaks out of jail by overpowering a guard.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Run to Costa Rica
programme.desc: David Harden is a clean-cut businessman living a double life as a burglar. His drug habit forces him to commit more daring crimes until he gets caught. He runs to Costa Rica, pulling scams until a friend turns him in.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Fetch a Hooker
programme.desc: Lane Slettvet, a muscle man for a drug dealer, liked to test fate. One night on a job to pick up a prostitute, Slettvet stabs a man. He tries to stay under the radar, but still goes to parties for the drugs.

programme.desc: A fugitive murders a man and flees to New York, where he plans a daring escape, while another breaks out of jail by overpowering a guard.

programme.desc: Peter Gibbs is a career criminal who is constantly lured to the dark side after every prison release, despite vowing to go straight. After a string of robberies catches up to him, he faces decades behind bars but refuses to go down without a fight.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Through an Air Duct
programme.desc: After killing a man, ex-con Rondell Reed crashes his getaway car and is sent to prison. He and his cellmate escape by squeezing through an air duct. Once free, he steals and carjacks his way north to Ohio where another chase leads to another car crash.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Lock and Load
programme.desc: A Texas separatist group takes two hostages. Rangers are able to negotiate the release, however two members, Richard Keyes and Mike Matson get away, evading helicopters and dogs. Using an underground militia group, Keyes hides out in the woods undetected.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Twister Camp
programme.desc: A couple needs help to save their mountain camp that was leveled by a tornado. With an emphasis on outdoor entertaining, Chase and the team add an open second floor and the desired finishing touches to the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Off-The-Grid Renovation
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, ME. They have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks. They face many challenges associated with building off-the-grid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Mural of the Story
programme.desc: Tamara works on restoring a 1909 Craftsman home, ripping out the tacky additions that have stripped it of its original charm. She saves a wallpaper mural that could be the showpiece of the dining room, if she can keep it from being destroyed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Clowning Around
programme.desc: Tamara continues with the 1909 Craftsman, transforming a small bedroom into the master bath. She saves and refurbishes French doors, vintage sinks, and a tub from the house, while adding modern elements like a sauna.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Shirtwaist Second Chance
programme.desc: Tamara Day restores neglected large homes, and helps families to love them again.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Bumming About the Plumbing
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist home that's short on bathrooms but not short on charm. She restores the front door, updates the fireplace and renovates the kitchen, but struggles with sewer and roof issues.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Mirror, Mirror on the Bathroom Wall
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist that has only one bathroom. She doubles the size of the walk-in closet and enlarges the master suite, but her hopes of updating the home's bedrooms start to sink when her contractor discovers a leak.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Marine Salvage
programme.desc: Mike and Robert head to Amelia Island, Florida, and get lessons in diving and safety so they can salvage under water. They recover old ship parts from the bottom of the ocean and transform them into an original piece.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Families Helping Families
programme.desc: Mike is going back to his roots and helping families, along with his kids, Michael and Sherry. At a home they dub The City Barn, they plan to fix the weathered roof and make the property more accessible for a 13-year-old who is battling cancer.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Not a Dry Eye in the House
programme.desc: The Flood House is close to completion and the showpiece gas fireplace with a custom mantel brings one of the homeowners to tears. Over at The City Barn, more structural issues arise, creating greater challenges than Mike and the team expected.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: No Bones About It
programme.desc: Police are called to investigate after Michael makes a startling discovery at The City Barn. Then, Mike shows The Toxic Townhouse's owners the structural issues and dangerous gas line.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Mike and the crew start a new home that was left half-finished by a contractor and find tons of problems behind the walls. Michael and designer Kimm go shopping for flooring with some furry friends, and Sherry and Cali take baby steps getting to work.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Wish Come True
programme.desc: The twice done house's troublesome fence, windows and caulking are done right for the first time, and Michael brings the homeowner over to show her the progress. Meanwhile, the half done house becomes the fully done house and the family is welcomed home.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Work continues on the twice done house as the crew finishes the flooring and the kitchen is installed. Mike must take care of a health issue, leaving Sherry and Michael to put the finishing touches on the renovation.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny Forest Cottage
programme.desc: New York newlyweds escape the city to build their first home upstate in a secluded part of the Hudson Valley. Utilizing timber felled from their own property, they plan to craft their own tiny house completely off the grid.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vail Log Cabin
programme.desc: The Walker family rebuilds their 100 year old mining cabin in the Colorado wilderness. Fortunately, they're a family of engineers who are game for any challenges. The tools used for this project will be as old as the cabin itself!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cascade Mountain Escape
programme.desc: A couple builds their 2400-square-foot dream cabin in the Cascade Mountains of Washington State.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Glacier River Cabin
programme.desc: A young couple leave the Air Force to build a cabin and start a new life in Alaska. With only three weeks to make it ready before winter, they call in family and friends to help. Follow their journey as they endure the elements and handcraft their home.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics I: Spinach Salad
programme.desc: Chef/Scientist Alton Brown examines spinach salad recipes.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Catfish Will Rise Again
programme.desc: Alton Brown sets out to modernize the image of the catfish.

programme.title: Good Eats: Use Your Noodle 5: Asian Noodles
programme.desc: Alton Brown investigates the culinary possibilities of Asian noodles.

programme.title: Good Eats: Let Them Eat (Icebox) Cake
programme.desc: Alton resuscitates the languishing tradition of the 'icebox' or 'refrigerator' cake. These no-bake cakes were all the rage in the 1950s, but they’re ready for a pastry redux.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Houston
programme.desc: Andrew explores Houston's Tex-Mex fajitas, Czech pastry, and Cajun mashups.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Trinidad And Tobago
programme.desc: Andrew samples the island flavors and culinary mashups of Trinidad and Tobago. These islands have a passion for food and life, featuring dishes like curried crab with dumplings, crispy fried shark sandwiches and soft and silky flatbreads.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Birmingham
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Birmingham, Alabama, home to one of the fastest growing food scenes in America. From the state's signature barbecue to innovative takes on Southern cuisine, he gets a taste of what makes the Magic City so unique.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Andrew visits Philadelphia and reveals its status as a cultural crossroads by making stops at Mexican, Indonesian and Israeli restaurants. Finally, a trip to Philadelphia isn't complete without visiting the oldest Italian restaurant in America.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Brooklyn
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern digs into Brooklyn, New York's, iconic eats. The multicultural borough offers old-school relics like insanely juicy steak, perfect New York pizza, Jewish pastries swirled with chocolate, decadent cheesecake and Russia's take on ravioli.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chicago Neighborhoods
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the neighborhoods that make Chicago a culinary treasure trove. From handcrafted burgers in the West Loop to street-style tacos in Wicker Park and barbecue chicken served up in Bronzeville.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew explores the frontier fare of Denver, Colorado. From classic game meats remade for the modern palette to the signature green chilli sauce of Den-Mex cuisine, Denver has become the region's cultural hub with an abundance of top-shelf food.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mauritius
programme.desc: From piping-hot fried dumplings and handmade egg noodles to veggie-stuffed flatbread and curried swordfish, Andrew Zimmern showcases the flavorful fusions of the island paradise of Mauritius.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Simple Goodness
programme.desc: Alfonso covers all things easy from snacks that evoke childhood memories like iconic Hostess Twinkies and the colorful Jel Sert Otter Pops to easy dinner solutions like Bertolli's Chicken Parmigiana and Penne.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Southern Treats
programme.desc: In the land of Dixie, see how a few of the favorite sweet Southern treats are made. Watch GooGoo Clusters take a bath in chocolate; Red Bird Peppermint Puffs earn their stripes, and find out the sweet secret behind Carolina Foods' Honeybun.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Vegas, Baby!
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean has a date with Lady Luck and is ready to go all-in on some tempting Vegas eats. He'll find out how prime rib lured us all to Sin City, and why prohibition poured us all a shrimp cocktail.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: War and Peace
programme.desc: Michael McKean gets caught in the middle of some culinary conflicts as he uncovers some very delicious details. He solves the Cuban Missile Crisis with chop suey, runs the redcoats out with cornbread and keeps the peace with a little kimchi.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Play With Your Food
programme.desc: Michael McKean turns our plates into a playground as he finds out the stories behind some famously fun foods! He'll spell out a solution to the Great Depression using alphabet soup and more.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Bon Appetit
programme.desc: Michael McKean is all berets and baguettes as he digs into a few of France's most fantastic feasts. He crosses the pond to see if crepes could nearly kill a king.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Fire in the Hole
programme.desc: Michael McKean fans the flames of some fiery hot foods. He discovers that flaming-hot vindaloo may have once been far less combustible, wasabi isn't always what it seems and that jerk chicken is good at keeping ghosts away.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Backyard BBQ
programme.desc: Michael McKean knows that where there's smoke, there's barbecue and he's ready to put the heat to the meat. He's learning how barbecue can boost brainpower, discovering Korean barbecue is anything but and explaining why barbecue brisket may be blessed.

programme.title: Good Eats: Behind the Eats
programme.desc: The show's crew reveals their thrilling, compelling and sometimes hard to believe behind the scenes secrets.

programme.title: Good Eats: Hittin' the Sauce

programme.title: Good Eats: Olive Me
programme.desc: Alton demystifies the flavourful little olive, which has changed the course of history.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tuna, Surprise!
programme.desc: Alton Brown raises the bar on canned tuna beyond the usual casserole or tuna sandwich.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics V: A Pound of Cake
programme.desc: Alton considers the pound cake to be an American classic.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Spicy

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Italian
programme.desc: Roger Mooking counts down 15 of the very best Italian dishes in the U.S. All the pastas, sauces, cheeses, pizzas, lasagnas and parms, no favorite is left behind. Also, chefs share authentic recipes and tips for making an Italian feast at home.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: South American Grilling
programme.desc: Roger meets two chefs celebrating Argentina's Asado and Brazil's Churrasco in northern California.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Light It Up!

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Karma Chameleon/ Team Effort
programme.desc: The Changs go on vacation and leave Ronnie Anne and her cousins to watch after Cam, the chameleon snake.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Guilt Trip/ Short Cut
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and her primos try to win Maria a trip around the world./ When Carlota fails at hair cutting, she trains with the master barber himself – CJ.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Munks/ World
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Allergic Reaction/ Lice-enced to Teach
programme.desc: Theodore develops an allergy to an unknown ingredient; Jeanette and the Chipmunks try to rescue a chimpanzee Bocarter keeps in a cage.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Unfair Science Fair / Unfair Science Fair Redux
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Out to Launch
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb build a rocket ship to get a better look and their mom and dad's star.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Got Game?/ Comet, Comet, Comet, Comet Kermilian
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb organize 'The F Games' for Buford and Isabella.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Out of Toon/ Hail Doofania!
programme.desc: Boys create a cartoon and cast themselves as superheroes and the villain is Candace.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Lake Nose Monster
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb set out to rescue the mysterious Lake Nose monster from the effects of living in a zinc-less lake.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Interview With a Platypus/ Tip of the Day
programme.desc: Animal translator built so the boys can figure out what Perry is really trying to say.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Attack of the 50 Foot Sister/ Backyard Aquarium
programme.desc: The boys create a PhineasandFerbalizer to speed up the growing process of vegetables.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Day of the Living Gelatin!/ Elementary, My Dear Stacy
programme.desc: Pool filled with bouncy gelatin and it comes to life; later family takes trip to England.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Don't Even Blink/ Chez Platypus
programme.desc: A determined Candace decides to find out where her brothers creations disappear to, and Phineas and Ferb open a platypus themed restaurant.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Perry Lays an Egg/ Gaming the System
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an egg, which they believe belongs to Perry, so they build a mechanical contraption to care for it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Chronicles of Meap
programme.desc: Space pod crashes carrying an unbearable cute alien, Meap; another adventure begins.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Thaddeus and Thor/ De Plane! De Plane!
programme.desc: Candace, Phineas and Ferb compete with their look-alikes; Candace goes to a party.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Let's Take a Quiz/ At the Car Wash
programme.desc: Candace wants to win popularity by going on Phineas and Ferb's TV game show. Later, an automatic carwash is created to help Isabella and the Fireside girls meet their fundraising goals.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Oh, There You Are, Perry/ Swiss Family Phineas
programme.desc: A musical device is built to find Perry/ A trip at sea strands the family on an island.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb's Musical Cliptastic Countdown
programme.desc: Dr. Doofenshmirtz and Major Monogram host a viewers' choice countdown special featuring the Top 10 favorite musical numbers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb's Quantum Boogaloo
programme.desc: Future Candace follows Phineas and Ferb through time when the boys try to find a yet-to-be invented tool for their rollercoaster. However, Candace's actions unwittingly prevent Agent P from defeating of Dr. Doofenshmirtz, which alters the future.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Hide and Seek/ That Sinking Feeling
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb shrink their friends while playing hide and seek.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Baljeatles/ Vanessassary Roughness
programme.desc: Baljeet signs up for rock camp and Vanessa tries to convince her dad she is responsible.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: No More Bunny Business/ Spa Day
programme.desc: Candace adopts a bunny that is really a rogue secret agent looking for Agent P. Then, Candace and Stacy's plans for a spa day inspire Phineas and Ferb.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bubble Boys/ Isabella and the Temple of Sap
programme.desc: Baljeet takes a break from his intense studying to go around town inside a giant bubble with Phineas and Ferb. Isabella, Adyson and the rest of the Fireside Girls go on an adventure to obtain a patch for sap collecting.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Cheer Up, Candace/ Fireside Girl Jamboree
programme.desc: Candace is down after Jeremy cancels their date/ Candace hopes to join the Fireside Girls.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Bully Code/ Finding Mary McGuffin
programme.desc: Dad accidentally sells Candace's favorite childhood doll, Mary McGuffin, to Dr. Doofenshmirtz. Baljeet asks for Phineas and Ferb's help when Buford starts to drive him nuts.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: What Do It Do?/ Atlantis
programme.desc: Candace thinks she finally has a strange device to show Mom and bust Phineas and Ferb when Agent P knocks Dr. Doofenshmirtz's latest '-inator' into the boys' front yard. Phineas and Ferb then reconstruct the device to find out what it does.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Picture This/ Nerdy Dancin'
programme.desc: The boys build a transport device so that they can retrieve Ferb's skateboard from England. Candice asks Jeremy to be her dance partner in a dance show, but Jeremy can't dance.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: I Was a Middle Aged Robot/ Suddenly Suzy
programme.desc: Candace is determined to win this year's father-daughter obstacle course, but unfortunately, Lawrence finds Agent P's lair and his memory is accidentally erased by a gadget.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Undercover Carl/ Hip Hip Parade
programme.desc: When Carl intercepts blue prints for Phineas and Ferb's Anti-Gravity Fun Launcher, he mistakenly thinks that they are assisting Dr. Doofenshmirtz with an evil plan so Major Monogram sends him incognito to uncover what the boys are doing.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Family Legacy/ Paint Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there’s treasure buried on their property.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Rated Cricket / Homeshare Hoedown
programme.desc: On the trip to Big City movie multiplex, Cricket thinks he’s too mature for a kids’ movie, so he sneaks into a grown-up movie. Cricket registers his house on a homeshare website.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Blood Moon
programme.desc: Cricket is excited for his first Halloween in Big City, where he and Tilly expect to collect way more candy than they ever got Trick-or-Treating in the country.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Shoes/ Feud Fight
programme.desc: When Cricket gets sick, his family steps in to fulfill his commitments for the day. Chip Whistler shows up at the farmers’ market in an attempt to steal business.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel are excited to join in on the fun, but when Wendy casually mentions that trick-or-treating is for kids, Dipper's whole outlook on the evening changes. Dipper accidentally insults a monster who makes him fill his candy quota or be eaten.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.desc: If the best parts of sports are how they can inspire people, college football has enjoyed a wealth of unforgettable moments that fans will cherish forever. These are the top 11 of those highlights, on the field and off.

programme.title: Black-ish: Colored Commentary
programme.desc: Dre wants the family to feel more connected so he encourages 'Team Johnson' to embrace what it means to have each other’s backs.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Santa/ White Christmas
programme.desc: Dre campaigns to be the new Santa at the annual office Christmas party, but when that honour goes to Angelica, the lovely head of HR, he goes to great lengths to unseat her because he’s convinced Stevens and Lido need a black Santa.

programme.title: Black-ish: Law of Attraction
programme.desc: Dre thinks Rainbow is questioning his machismo after another man dismisses him in front of her, but when Pops swoops in to help his son save face, Ruby is attracted to his show of manliness and the couple reignite their love affair.

programme.title: Black-ish: Martin Luther Skiing Day
programme.desc: On the way to the Johnson family's annual Martin Luther King holiday ski trip, Dre realizes his children may not know the significance of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. so he decides to inundate them with Dr. King history facts.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: A magazine program featuring current events as seen from a Christian perspective, as well as testimonies of changed lives.

programme.title: 700 Club Interactive
programme.desc: Teaching Biblical principles and tackling a variety of topics. Social media is used to minister directly to its audience and encourages viewers to ask questions and send in prayer requests.

programme.title: The Middle: Stormy Moon
programme.desc: Frankie is gobsmacked when she is handcuffed, arrested and taken to the police station. When she discovers that her arrest was over an unreturned library book, she sets her sights on the real guilty party. Axl and Cassidy reunite.

programme.title: The Middle: The Walk
programme.desc: After bumping into some old acquaintances on a walk around the neighbourhood, Frankie and Mike realize that they are more interesting and charming with them than they are with each other and search for a way to remedy the situation.

programme.title: Movie: Back to the Future
programme.desc: A teenager roars back through time to 1955, where he meets his parents at a young age.

programme.title: Movie: Back to the Future II
programme.desc: After travelling to the year 2015 to fix his future family's problems, Marty finds himself having to return once again to 1955 to stop Biff from further altering time.

programme.title: Movie: Back to the Future III
programme.desc: A time traveller ventures to 1885 to prevent his friend's murder and preserve the future.

programme.title: Golf
programme.desc: Golf.

programme.title: Animal Kingdom: Ghosts
programme.desc: The Cody family sets off on Smurf's mysterious heist, unaware that the surprises that await them will change their family forever.

programme.title: Movie: Law Abiding Citizen
programme.desc: After one of the men who killed his wife and daughter is set free, Clyde Shelton takes justice into his own hands and begins taking out everyone that was connected to the case.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Master of Horror
programme.desc: With New Orleans decorated for Halloween, the team investigates the murder of a naval staff Judge Advocate found in a cemetery dressed in a Victorian costume with vampiric puncture wounds on her neck. Meanwhile, the team debates Halloween night activity.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Watch Over Me
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a navy officer with the highest level top secret clearance who was recently assigned as a tech liaison with a private developer. Also, Pride transforms the carport into an auto shop.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Love Hurts
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a petty officer found in a Mardi Gras float storage facility with an engagement ring and proposal plan in hand. However, the case takes a mysterious turn when the team is unable to locate his supposed girlfriend.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Chasing Ghosts
programme.desc: After a stolen navy-issued gun is found to belong to a Chief Petty officer who died 40 years ago, the team reopens the cold case, one that Wade has tracked and investigated for years. Also, the team prepares for their annual Thanksgiving dinner together.

programme.title: Charmed: There's Something About Leo
programme.desc: Leo uses his new powers to reverse time so he can save himself and vanquish the demons.

programme.title: Charmed: Witchness Protection
programme.desc: The Avatars insist Leo protect the Seer because she has information to destroy demons.

programme.title: Charmed: Ordinary Witches
programme.desc: Piper agrees to switch powers with Phoebe so that she too can see her premonition.

programme.title: Charmed: Extreme Makeover: World Edition
programme.desc: The Avatars decide that the human world must be put to sleep so they can kill the demons.

programme.title: Supernatural: Slash Fiction
programme.desc: Two Leviathans clone Sam and Dean and go on a killing spree. Now the subjects of a nationwide manhunt, Sam and Dean need to drop off the grid, so Bobby sends them to a quirky surveillance expert for help.

programme.title: Supernatural: The Mentalists
programme.desc: Sam and Dean investigate the gruesome murders of resident mediums in Lily Dale, the most psychic town in America. They discover that an angry spirit is killing off the psychics, but have trouble identifying which medium is controlling the ghost.

programme.title: Supernatural: Season Seven, Time for a Wedding!
programme.desc: While on a hunt, Sam runs into someone from his past and a confrontation ensues. Meanwhile, Dean reluctantly teams up with a quirky, laid-back hunter named Garth when he finds himself in a situation that he just can't explain.

programme.title: Supernatural: How to Win Friends and Influence Monsters
programme.desc: Sam, Dean and Bobby become hunters when they set up camp in a New Jersey state park to track a creature that has been attacking people in the woods. The townsfolk believe it is the real Jersey Devil.

programme.title: Supernatural: Death's Door
programme.desc: As Sam and Dean race the clock on a high-stakes mission, Bobby seeks the help of an unlikely, old friend to solve one of the most personal cases of his life.

programme.title: Movie: The Replacements
programme.desc: Replacements are brought in to substitute for a team of striking football players.

programme.title: Movie: The Godfather III
programme.desc: Michael Corleone seeks to legitimize his interests and remove himself from the underworld.

programme.title: Movie: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: A simple man finds himself in extraordinary situations throughout the course of his life.

programme.title: Movie: Men of Honor
programme.desc: A man is determined to become a navy diver in spite of the overwhelming obstacles in his way.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead: Eye of the Beholder
programme.desc: Go back to the beginning of the zombie apocalypse, when the world was changing rapidly.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead: The New Frontier

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead: TEOTWAWKI
programme.desc: Still finding their place, Alicia and Nick fall in with new crowds while Madison discovers Otto's past mimics that of her own.

programme.title: Movie: Anything for Love
programme.desc: Katherine believes men are intimidated by her career, creates an internet dating profile claiming she is an executive assistant rather than a high-powered executive.

programme.title: Movie: All of My Heart: Inn Love
programme.desc: Brian and Jenny are engaged and preparing for the grand opening of their bed and breakfast, Emily's Country Inn. But when a big storm hits Bucks County, all their plans end up sopping wet.

programme.title: Movie: Summer Villa
programme.desc: A romance novelist with writer's block and a celebrity chef suffering from a bad review accidentally end up staying at the same French villa for the summer. A connection grows as they attempt to share the house.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Accurate Conception
programme.desc: Blanche's daughter, Rebecca, has some wonderful news. She's going to become a mother through artificial insemination. However, Blanche is less than thrilled and totally against the entire idea.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose Fights Back
programme.desc: When the company that Rose's husband worked for, cuts off their pension plan, Rose must face the fact that she's going to get a new job, one that pays more.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love Under the Big Top
programme.desc: Dorothy's in a serious relationship with a lawyer and jumps to the conclusion that he's on the verge of proposing. His annoucement is shocking as he's leaving law to become a circus clown. Rose and Blanch put together a protest to save some dolphins.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dancing in the Dark
programme.desc: Rose has been dating, Miles Webber, a college professor, but the only thing they seem to have in common is the dance floor.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Not Another Monday
programme.desc: Sophia's friend has come up with an idea that will change her life. She wants to commit suicide and she wants Sophia there to hold her hand.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Old Feeling
programme.desc: Blanche is visited by her brother in-law and is taken back by his resemblance to her deceased husband. She quickly finds herself falling in love with hopes of marriage.

programme.title: Frasier: A New Position for Roz
programme.desc: While preparing to leave KACL for a new job, Roz is concerned about Frasier and Julia.

programme.title: Frasier: No Sex Please, We're Skittish
programme.desc: Though KACL has hired her replacement, Roz is not ready to turn in her headphones.

programme.title: Frasier: A Man, a Plan and a Gal
programme.desc: Daphne and Niles have a dinner party to make an announcement; Frasier faces his fear.

programme.title: Frasier: The Doctor Is Out
programme.desc: Frasier is mistakenly believed to be gay when a caller sees him with Niles in a bar.

programme.title: Frasier: The Babysitter
programme.desc: It's Crane vs. Crane when Frasier and Martin compete for the affections of the same girl.

programme.title: Frasier: The Placeholder
programme.desc: Frasier's decision to date until he finds Ms. Right leaves him feeling like a fifth wheel.

programme.title: Frasier: I'm Listening
programme.desc: Frasier overhears his father's girlfriend making a date with another man.

programme.title: Frasier: Maris Returns
programme.desc: Niles is shocked when his ex-wife Maris re-enters his life, but he doesn't tell Daphne.

programme.title: Reba: All Growed Up
programme.desc: Reba learns to let her children make their own decisions when Van decides to quit school.

programme.title: Reba: The United Front
programme.desc: Reba is thrilled when Kyra asks her for advice on boys, but she later regrets giving it.

programme.title: Reba: To Tell You the Truth
programme.desc: Cheyenne suspects Van of cheating on her and kicks him out of the house.

programme.title: Reba: Brock's Mulligan
programme.desc: Brock tells Barbara Jean and Reba of his plans to become a professional golfer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Comedy of Errors
programme.desc: Dorothy wants to fulfill her ambition to become a stand-up comic.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: All That Jazz
programme.desc: Dorothy's son shows up, jobless and wifeless, and wanting to be a free spirit.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebb Tide
programme.desc: Dorothy accompanies Blanche to Atlanta for Big Daddy's funeral.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Have Yourself a Very Little Christmas
programme.desc: Christmas is driving everyone a little crazy as they all search for the perfect gifts.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mary Has a Little Lamb
programme.desc: Dorothy aids a pregnant and unwed teen who was rejected by her father.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Great Expectations
programme.desc: Rose is touting the power of positive thinking; Blanche's beau has a heart attack.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Singer Jordan Davis stops by to share his new song, 'Almost Maybes.'

programme.title: The Middle: Not Your Brother's Drop Off
programme.desc: Sue cannot contain her excitement over getting ready to move out of the house and into the dorm to start college. But Sue's excitement starts to give way to dread when she accidentally burns her hair and ends up having to cut it short.

programme.title: The Middle: Cutting the Cord
programme.desc: Nervous about starting college and disappointed that her dorm roommate has not arrived yet, Sue begins to drive Frankie and Mike crazy with her multiple texts and calls at all hours. Meanwhile, Axl and Hutch find their house being overrun by ants.

programme.title: The Middle: The Shirt
programme.desc: Frankie is speechless when Mike whose entire wardrobe consists of long sleeved flannel shirts decides to wear a short sleeved Hawaiian shirt when they go out to dinner with some friends.

programme.title: The Middle: Risky Business
programme.desc: Frankie is completely gobsmacked when Mike's brother Rusty pays an unexpected visit and offers him an opportunity to partner on one of his crazy business ideas and Mike wants in.

programme.title: Reba: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: Everyone panics when Kyra disappears during the middle of the night.

programme.title: Reba: The Big Fix-up
programme.desc: Reba goes on a blind date with a man from church; Van and Cheyenne butt heads over money.

programme.title: Reba: The Good Girl
programme.desc: A rebellious Reba takes Van's new sports car out for a spin and ends up scratching it.

programme.title: Reba: Happy Pills
programme.desc: Barbara Jean suspects that Brock may be having an affair; Kyra experiences boy problems.

programme.title: Reba: Girls' Night Out
programme.desc: During a girl's night out, tension between Reba and Barbra Jean causes a bar brawl.

programme.title: Reba: Core Focus
programme.desc: Barbra Jean asks Reba to help her tell Brock that she wants to have another baby.

programme.title: Movie: A Country Wedding
programme.desc: A country western star returns to his hometown to sell his childhood home. Upon his arrival, he meets the girl he proposed to when he was eight. Faced with old feelings, he will discover what really matters in life.

programme.title: The Office: Pilot
programme.desc: Michael Scott decides not to tell his staff that the branch may be downsizing.

programme.title: The Office: Health Care
programme.desc: When Corporate wants Michael to pick a cheaper health plan for his employees, Michael shirks responsibility and Dwight happily accepts the task. Delighted with his new position of power, Dwight manages to offend everyone.

programme.title: The Office: The Alliance
programme.desc: Dwight and Jim form an alliance to protect themselves during the upcoming downsizing.

programme.title: The Office: Basketball
programme.desc: The office staff prepares for a game of basketball against the workers in the warehouse.

programme.title: The Office: Hot Girl
programme.desc: Michael believes he is going to 'score' when he gives an attractive woman a ride home.

programme.title: The Office: The Dundies
programme.desc: The Dunder Mifflin employees suffer through the annual office awards ceremony, The Dundies, hosted by their pompous boss Michael Scott at their local watering hole.

programme.title: The Office: Sexual Harassment
programme.desc: Just as his best friend Todd Packer visits the office, Michael fears that a new corporate crackdown on sexual harassment will dampen his reputation.

programme.title: The Office: Office Olympics
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight are out of the office for the day as Michael tries to close a deal on a new condo for himself. Meanwhile, Jim and Pam organize an "Office Olympics" where the staff members compete in ridiculous games.

programme.title: The Office: The Fire
programme.desc: A fire in the kitchen forces the employees of the Dunder Mifflin paper company to the parking lot. To ease everyone's boredom, Jim suggests a game where staff members reveal a little too much information about themselves.

programme.title: The Office: The Fight
programme.desc: After Dwight karate punches Michael, Jim organizes a lunchtime rematch at Dwight's dojo where Pam becomes annoyed when Jim gets too friendly with her.

programme.title: The Office: The Client
programme.desc: When Michael and Jan go after a new client, Michael surprises his boss in more ways than one. Meanwhile, Jim finds a screenplay written by Michael and the cubicle jockeys at Dunder Mifflin have a hilarious time acting it out.

programme.title: The Office: Performance Review
programme.desc: On performance review day, the employees meet with Michael to discuss their work performances. The only thing on Michael's mind is his own impending review from his boss later that day.

programme.title: The Office: E-Mail Surveillance
programme.desc: The employees at Dunder Mifflin are upset when Michael starts monitoring their emails. Meanwhile, Pam suspects Dwight and Angela are having an affair. Michael later shows up uninvited at Jim's barbecue and sings karaoke.

programme.title: The Office: Booze Cruise
programme.desc: When Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin crew on a motivational harbour cruise aboard a party boat on Lake Wallenpaupack, things get out of hand and Michael ends up in the brig. Meanwhile, Jim is bummed when Roy and Pam finally set a wedding date.

programme.title: South Park: Asspen
programme.desc: While the adults are trapped at a time-share sales meeting, Stan is challenged by the best skier on the mountain to compete for the prettiest girl's affections.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Finds Love
programme.desc: Cartman finally lets a special someone knows exactly how he feels about them.

programme.title: South Park: The Cissy
programme.desc: Randy is harboring a giant secret and the pressure is getting to him. Meanwhile, Cartman calls Stan a cissy.

programme.title: South Park: Stunning and Brave
programme.desc: The boys express their utmost respect for Caitlyn Jenner in the most stunning and brave South Park ever.

programme.title: South Park: Sarcastaball
programme.desc: The people of South Park Elementary address the crisis in football concussions.

programme.title: South Park: Butters' Bottom Bitch
programme.desc: Butters is determined to get his first kiss so his friends won't make fun of him anymore. Soon he's running his own ring of girls who will kiss for money and runs into trouble with some pimps.

programme.title: South Park: Trapped in the Closet
programme.desc: Scientologists converge on Stan's house after he is identified as the reincarnation of L. Ron Hubbard. One A-lister locks himself in the closet and refuses to come out, after Stan criticizes his 'talent.'

programme.title: South Park: Cherokee Hair Tampons
programme.desc: Kyle is on his deathbed with a rare kidney disease. Cartman is found to be the perfect donor, but withholds his kidney until Kyle can pay him 10 million dollars.

programme.title: South Park: Red Hot Catholic Love
programme.desc: A sexual abuse scandal involving Catholic priests hits South Park and is taken all the way to the Vatican.

programme.desc: The case of a troubled missing boy quickly turns into a homicide investigation.

programme.title: The Closer: Sudden Death

programme.title: The Closer: Split Ends
programme.desc: Deputy Chief Johnson has her hands full trying to solve a murder when a hairdresser on a movie set is found dead. Meanwhile, Brenda's folks are in town pressuring her to set a wedding date.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Sanctuary City
programme.desc: As the case of the St. Joseph's three leads to its unexpected conclusion, Commander Sharon Raydor attempts to balance the case, her family arriving, and her fast approaching wedding to Lt. Andy Flynn.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: When a well-known attorney, celebrated for her defense of oppressed women is found dead, there is no shortage of high-profile suspects including her son, her ex-husband, a film director whose career she destroyed and a football player.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: As the squad investigates the death of a second woman related to the Tackles case, and a new theory materializes, Sharon faces a health setback. Meanwhile, Gus reacts unexpectedly to Rusty's partial solution to their ongoing relationship problems.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: The murder of a prominent businessman in Colorado is particularly difficult to solve since the killers left virtually no forensic evidence at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Duelling Confessions
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead on the side of the road her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man. It would take forty years, an author and an expert in pedestrian accidents to find the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry
programme.desc: A unique application of forensic science gives investigators a different explanation for a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Promises
programme.desc: A tape recorded by a popular gym teacher before his own death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Time to Dash

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Double Birthday Party
programme.desc: One of Molly Yeh's best friends is in town for their birthdays, so Molly is making her most-delicious party bites for the double celebration.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Hockey Game!
programme.desc: Molly Yeh and her husband, Nick, host a hockey party for their sports-loving friends. She makes all her favourites, including crispy fried chicken sandwiches with super-creamy chipotle mayo and homemade noodles.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Midwest Delicatesse
programme.desc: Molly Yeh and her husband, Nick, are missing the Big Apple, especially the food. So to crush the craving, she whips up pastrami sandwiches with onion rings, hearty chicken kreplach soup and, for dessert, beautiful black and pink cookies.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Ladies' Painting Party
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making a slew of colorful dishes for a painting party. The menu includes her pork meatball banh mi sandwiches, crispy rice salad with kale and succulent ham summer rolls. For dessert, there's a terrazzo jelly cake to draw then devour.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Afternoon Tea
programme.desc: Ree and Paige reminisce about an incredible trip to New York over an afternoon tea party for two! On the menu are divine Ham and Leek Mini Quiches, Garden Spread Finger Sandwiches, Lemon Raspberry Tarts and Mini Doughnut Muffins.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Boxing Boys
programme.desc: Ree bakes fruity granola chocolate chip cookies and prepares a dinner of Italian sloppy Joes with delicious garlic toast.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Birthday Bash
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's family is throwing a joint birthday bash for Todd and his cousin Caleb, so she's cooking up Caleb's barbecue favorite, Spicy Pulled Pork Sliders piled high with fabulous fixins, along with make-ahead Slow Cooker Baked Beans.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Breakfast on the Run
programme.desc: It's the story of three awesome grab and go breakfasts. Breakfast cookies are a perfect jump start on the morning. Then there's a bountiful bento box with baked oatmeal and individual ham casseroles. Finally, Todd makes apple granola stackers.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cleaning Out The Fridge
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cleaning out her fridge and using up food that's on its way out. She's turning milk and cream into a wonderful lemon rice pudding with leftover lemons, while the produce drawer is transformed into a cool, delicious fridge gazpacho.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Meals: Cowboy Favorites
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is sharing 16-minute favorites for cowboys and cowgirls, too. She makes steak medallions and potatoes, gnocchi with chorizo and corn, crisp in a pinch and finally a chicken jalapeno popper quesadilla.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All in the Family

programme.desc: Three adorable litters of puppies come of age. The first few months of these Pugs, Mini-Australian Shepherds and Rottweillers' lives will be filled with adventure, including an introduction to the agility course and a lesson in duck-herding.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Nightmare on Cat Street
programme.desc: Jackson works with a couple who have a lovable cat, Zachary, that also happens to spray all over the house. Jackson has a shocking conclusion as to why Zachary marks. Then, Jackson meets up with troublemaking cat named Freddie Krueger.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Island of Snakes
programme.desc: Steve travels to Sri Lanka to investigate why this country has the highest incidents of snakebite deaths in the world. In his hands on approach, Steve joins rice paddy workers, buffalo herders, and tea pickers to find many venomous species in their midst.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Elephant Dynamics
programme.desc: Zookeepers send an SOS to the vet when members of their large otter family develop bald patches. A pair of young flamingos may have their bromance split up by an injury, while elephant Anjan mourns the loss of his siblings and acts out for attention.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bears Will Be Bears
programme.desc: The brown bears keep tearing up their exhibit, leaving zoo staff scrambling for a solution. Armani the aardvark gets treated for a tooth infection which has dampened her enthusiasm for digging. And, a group of burrowing owls prepare to move.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Season 3 Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Steve Irwin's family carry on his legacy as they run the Australian Zoo.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Luck O' the Irish Cottage
programme.desc: An Irish family in Orange County, CA has the perfect olive tree in their backyard to nestle a Celtic-themed cottage.

programme.title: Tanked!: Sherri Shepherd on the Rocks
programme.desc: Famous TV host and actress Sherri Shepherd reaches out to Wayde and Brett to build her a simple but elegant tank for her home. While that's underway, a company named Rugged Ridge has the rest of the shop sweating over their most outrageous build ever.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Our Growing Pack
programme.desc: A California man hopes to find a new dog to stay by his side as be battles cancer. After Lizzy rescues a sick dog, she rushes to the vet, hoping it's not too late. Tania and Perry prepare to embark on a new chapter in life by entering parenthood.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Never Let Go
programme.desc: The police need Villalobos' help when a woman in the French Quarter is rushed to the hospital, leaving her dogs behind. A recent divorcee from Alabama visits the rescue to help fill the void in his home. Favourite dog, Rhino, faces a health crisis.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wet and Wild
programme.desc: A hot summer weekend in Texas keeps wardens busy on the water. A festival attracts thousands of people to float the San Marcos River. Patrol on Lake Texoma leads to multiple arrests. A fisherman is questioned when he can't provide identification.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Season 8 Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Follow Maine's elite game-warden service as they work during hunting season.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Chase on the Border
programme.desc: When the Texas Game Wardens encounter a sick bald eagle, it becomes a race against time to ensure its survival.

programme.desc: Scientists looking to cure Alzheimer's perform experiments on sharks in the open ocean. They are forced to fight for their lives when the experiment goes horribly wrong.

programme.desc: Seven fantasy and sci-fi characters team up to prevent a madman from starting a war.

programme.title: Movie: Olympus Has Fallen

programme.title: Home Town: Small Town Sophistication
programme.desc: A couple that's moving back to Mississippi is looking for a spacious home for under $260,000 where they can host friends and throw parties.

programme.title: Home Town: Fire and Water
programme.desc: A couple is looking for a house where they can entertain friends in a walkable neighborhood. Ben and Erin give their pick a complete facelift by adding a coastal color scheme, built-in banquet and a back patio that's perfect for entertaining.

programme.title: Home Town: Closer to Mom
programme.desc: A New Orleans couple is looking for a vacation home in Laurel to be closer to her mom, and their ideal house needs space for hosting crawfish boils. Ben and Erin transform a dated home into a modern oasis complete with two kitchens and a spectacular pool.

programme.title: Good Bones: Down to the Studs: Fountain Square Flashback
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are headed back to their old stomping grounds in the Fountain Square neighborhood, to tackle a charming old bungalow. They bought the property from a couple who lived there for more than 50 years and knew it would be taken care of.

programme.title: Good Bones: A Charred Charmer for Cory
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are tackling a 100-year-old home that's endured a severe fire and foundational damage. Cory loves its potential and is interested in making this his permanent home, but the costly list of extreme challenges may cause him to get burned.

programme.title: $50K Three Ways: 1st + Forever Home
programme.desc: Between a backyard with no privacy, a tiny home office and a dated kitchen, two homeowners have their pick of which rooms to renovate in their first and forever home. Given the house's age and condition, Tiffany will have to work to keep them on budget.

programme.title: House Hunters: No Open Concept in Illinois
programme.desc: A couple with four kids looks to trade their open concept home for a more traditional layout in Chicago. They're looking for a large home with five bedrooms, but finding a place that can also accommodate two home offices will be a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters: Plastic Surgeon Glam in Atlanta
programme.desc: A plastic surgeon and her husband seek a new home for their family in Atlanta, Georgia. They're looking for outdoor space for their daughter and room to accommodate his mother, but she's pushing for glam details and doesn't mind spending more to get it.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Family Comfort in Maynooth, Ireland
programme.desc: A young family downsizes for a new job and the exciting opportunity to move to Maynooth, Ireland. They're looking for a place with three bedrooms that's near their children's school, but finding the ideal place on one income will be a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters: Plastic Surgeon Glam in Atlanta
programme.desc: A plastic surgeon and her husband seek a new home for their family in Atlanta, Georgia. They're looking for outdoor space for their daughter and room to accommodate his mother, but she's pushing for glam details and doesn't mind spending more to get it.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Family Comfort in Maynooth, Ireland
programme.desc: A young family downsizes for a new job and the exciting opportunity to move to Maynooth, Ireland. They're looking for a place with three bedrooms that's near their children's school, but finding the ideal place on one income will be a challenge.

programme.title: Good Bones: Down to the Studs: Fountain Square Flashback
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are headed back to their old stomping grounds in the Fountain Square neighborhood, to tackle a charming old bungalow. They bought the property from a couple who lived there for more than 50 years and knew it would be taken care of.

programme.title: Good Bones: The Cottage Catastrophe
programme.desc: Mina and Karen return to the Old Southside neighborhood to renovate a crusty cottage that's been empty for years. When an unexpected disaster hits, the duo must rethink their entire plan and create a beautiful home that will turn a profit.

programme.title: Good Bones: MJ's Dream Home
programme.desc: Design assistant MJ, and his husband recently bought their first home, and Mina and Karen want to make MJ's dreams a reality. The duo works to blend traditional and modern styles, but MJ may have to compromise to stay in budget.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Two-Bedroom Dilemma
programme.desc: Siblings struggling to sell their sister's home need Lyndsay and Leslie's expertise. The twins redefine the dated two-bedroom rambler into a modern three-bedroom farmhouse with a deck that will be enjoyed even on a rainy Pacific Northwestern day.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Mid-Mod Oasis
programme.desc: A homeowner seeks Leslie and Lyndsay's help to sell her inconsistently styled midcentury modern house. By decking out a dreamy backyard oasis and trimming trees to show off the water and mountain vista, the twins clear the way for a high sales price.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Day Care Redo
programme.desc: A woman that operates a day care out of her house is having trouble selling since buyers can't visualize her business as a family home. Lyndsay and Leslie transition the commercial space back into a cozy residence with a vintage farmhouse style.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Nest Egg Reno
programme.desc: A daughter begs Leslie and Lyndsay to take over her mother's rambler after it sat on the market for three months. Using a few of their tricks, the twins change its dated and choppy layout by opening up the home and giving it a calming, coastal vibe.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Nineties to Now
programme.desc: After sitting on the market for months, a couple's dated tract home urgently needs Lyndsay and Leslie's help. Competing with new builds in the area, they update the home with a high-end cabin look and new feel that brings in offers WAY over asking price.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Sibling Split Level
programme.desc: Contractor Jeff's sister and brother-in-law want to move into their forever home, but they need to get their split level off the market. With a generous sibling discount and some creativity, Leslie and Lyndsay turn the home into a French country cottage.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Historic Home Rescue
programme.desc: An overwhelmed woman needs Lyndsay and Leslie's help after her mother's home has sat on the market for months. Restoring the 1906 home to its original charm becomes their passion project as they expose its classic character with a cozy-chic cottage feel.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Renewed Ocean Views
programme.desc: A woman is overwhelmed with trying to sell her mom's underwhelming condo. Lyndsay and Leslie step in to reinvent condo living by remodeling the space for mature buyers with a modern Mediterranean design that showcases its stunning ocean view.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Vegas Dream Home
programme.desc: Down-and-out pro-boxer Damian hit hard times in Lancaster, California, before his dream came true and won $1 million on a scratcher. He immediately moved his family to Las Vegas, Nevada, and called in a design expert to help decorate.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Deano and Carissa: A Scratch Made in Heaven
programme.desc: After winning a state-record $7 million on a single scratch ticket, an Midwest dad hunts for the perfect family home for his partner and kids in their current rural Indiana neighborhood.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Family Fortune
programme.desc: Ever since a Massachusetts mom came home from the grocery with an extra $4 million in her pocket, her husband and her two daughters have been ecstatic to go dream home shopping with David Bromstad.

programme.desc: After winning $180 million, Rick and Lorie look for their dream home.

programme.desc: After a family tree DNA test reveals that her deceased father lived a double life, a woman meets the half-sister she never knew she had.

programme.desc: A woman mimics the bizarre behavior that led to her fiance's mysterious death, and a couple experiences a horrifying legend firsthand.

programme.desc: A young boy claims his imaginary friend pushed his sister through a second-story window, and a newly divorced woman relives the terrifying history of the remote cabin she's rented.

programme.desc: A man suffering from sleep paralysis captures evidence that something is entering his room. Then, a pregnant woman fears something is trying to harm her unborn child.

programme.desc: Don Wildman examines a pen and inkwell connected to a poisonous political plot, a routine flight gone terribly wrong and a mule that was entered in a horse race.

programme.desc: Luann hosts an eclectic lunch party for the ladies at her Sag Harbor home with a nude male model as the main event. Leah's frustrations with Ramona boil over, and Luann and Eboni get into a heated debate that leaves everyone reeling.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Stop and Throw the Roses
programme.desc: The gravity of Luann and Eboni's paint party confrontation begins to set in, and beachside fishing turns cold when politics are brought up in conversation. Meanwhile, Heather’s faux pas comes back to haunt her.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Electile Dysfunction
programme.desc: After the ladies compete in Luann’s 70’s inspired Halloween pageant, Leah receives devastating news about her grandma. Back in the city, Ramona reviews her real estate skills, while Leah and Eboni help Sonja learn to land a punch.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Never Before Scene: A Harlem Night
programme.desc: An elite and powerful set of New York socialites as they juggle careers and home lives.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: The Salem Bitch Trials

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Deck the Halls with Drama
programme.desc: Robyn and Juan seek couples therapy to move forward in their relationship. Gizelle works hard to make sure Robyn’s engagement goes off without a hitch, but Michael's skepticism causes her to panic.

programme.desc: A family brings in an old pickup truck to be restored in memory of their mom, and Danny needs to figure out how to build the perfect tribute vehicle without blowing the budget. Later on, he finds a rare old Oldsmobile 442 that the owner wants to sell.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tricked Out Triumph
programme.desc: Danny and the team are commissioned to restore a 1941 Triumph motorcycle back to its World War II-era glory. Even with a $50,000 budget, the project turns into one of the biggest challenges in Count's Kustoms history.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tricked Out Triumph
